title: The weighted two-cell squared L2 energy is nonnegative

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: If both cell masses are nonnegative, the weighted squared L2 energy is nonnegative.
informal.expected_conclusion: The weighted two-cell squared energy is nonnegative.

declarations.name: weightedCellL2Sq2
declarations.statement: def weightedCellL2Sq2 (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) : Real := m0 * u0 ^ 2 + m1 * u1 ^ 2

declarations.name: weightedCellL2Sq2_nonneg
declarations.statement: theorem weightedCellL2Sq2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate nonnegativity of the weighted two-cell squared L2 energy into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedCellL2Sq2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the energy and combining nonnegative masses with nonnegative squares.
tasks.target: Unfold weightedCellL2Sq2 and use mul_nonneg, sq_nonneg, and nlinarith.
